evaluations.prompt: Prepare a red team review for the authentication logic.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent creates a temp/red-team-review-authentication directory, writes a strict security auditor prompt to prompt.md, and crucially places prompt.md as the VERY FIRST item in the file-manifest.json before bundling.
Agent detects the missing topic/target and asks the user what specific module or feature needs to be reviewed before attempting to create directories or prompts.

evaluations.prompt: Red team review for the payment gateway.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent successfully generates the final markdown payload in the temp directory and provides clear instructions to the user on how to copy/paste it into an external LLM.
